untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by 13-week log returns and selecting top/bottom performers by percentile rank. This requires relative cross-sectional ranking (long top decile, short bottom decile) which cannot be expressed as a single-instrument technical condition. The backtest engine would need a ranking/sorting module or portfolio construction layer not available in the condition-based rule format.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using log_returns direction as proxy, but true momentum ranking strategy requires: (1) calculation of 13-week cumulative log returns per stock, (2) ranking across universe, (3) portfolio construction with long/short legs. Hold period set to 91 days (~13 weeks). Weekly rebalance frequency noted but not expressible in this schema. AUTHOR_SILENT on specific entry thresholds; ranking percentiles unknown.
